# DispatchTimeoutResult.success

**Case**

Indicates that a dispatch operation successfully finished before the specified time elapsed.

## Declaration

```swift
case success
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **DispatchTimeoutResult.timedOut**: Indicates that a dispatch operation failed to finish before the specified time elapsed.
